Our approach to working with teams is in phase one, we do a strategy sprint to just really understand your audience, your product, your company, and we develop these artifacts that give the context necessary for our workflows to be effective.

As you continue through the process with a deep researcher, we're generating these research questions.

That absolutely does happen.
We take the full article.
